notes: Track deep-archive provenance rescue attempts separately from importable evidence rows.
Record only defensible source facts in attempted_sources; keep speculative follow-ups in next_hypothesis.

attempted_sources.source_label: Future Of Mankind Contact Report 465 English translation page
attempted_sources.attempt_outcome: Mirror translation date is still 4438 days after the matched Sichuan earthquake.

attempted_sources.source_label: FIGU shop product page for Plejadisch-plejarische Kontaktberichte Block 11
attempted_sources.attempt_outcome: Official FIGU shop metadata exists, but the product page is much later than the event.

attempted_sources.source_label: Wayback CDX for the exact Block 11 shop URL
attempted_sources.attempt_outcome: The exact shop URL returned no 200-status captures.

entries.next_hypothesis: Search for a pre-2008 official FIGU PDF, bulletin extract, or legacy downloads page for Block 11; the current mirror and shop sources cannot rescue the row.
entries.notes: No paired contradiction forced expansion beyond the listed target row.

attempted_sources.source_label: Future Of Mankind Contact Report 136 first page revision
attempted_sources.attempt_outcome: The earliest mirror revision is decades after the 1981 Greece earthquake.

attempted_sources.source_label: FIGU shop product page for Plejadisch-plejarische Kontaktberichte Block 04
attempted_sources.attempt_outcome: The official shop page proves a modern product listing only and cannot rescue a pre-web 1981 event.

entries.next_hypothesis: Treat this as a print-era rescue problem: look for a dated German Block 04 edition, catalog record, or scanned FIGU periodical that predates 1981-02-24.
entries.notes: Web-era provenance cannot close a gap this large.
